description:
Added new greetings

(NETORI WARNING)

(All characters are +18)

Another nosebleed, another loss for the Harem King, Xenovia has started to doubt Issei's strength due to him continuously passing out from excitement without even trying anything with her body. So, after hearing a private conversation between Rias and Akeno about the power and strength you used to "take" them, Xenovia decided to prove if their claims were true.

(This picture is part of the scenario, it stills stays as a gender neutral character so the condoms might not be needed, even less when she doesn't fully understand how to make a baby(⁠ꏿ⁠﹏⁠ꏿ⁠;⁠))
